title: Structured Log Format
description: Contract 6 — Every service MUST emit logs to stdout in this exact JSON format. No plain-text logs in production. Forward-compatible: unknown fields are tolerated (additionalProperties:true) so producers may add context without breaking log ingestion.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp with millisecond precision, e.g. `2026-05-22T10:00:00.000Z`.

level.description: Log severity. DEBUG = detailed flow (dev/staging only, never prod by default); INFO = normal operation milestones; WARN = recoverable issue (fallback/retry/quota approaching); ERROR = operation failed but service still running; FATAL = service cannot continue, log then exit.

service.description: Logical service name emitting the log line, e.g. `llms-gateway`.

version.description: Semantic version of the running service build, e.g. `1.2.3`.

trace_id.description: Distributed-tracing correlation id (UUID) for the request (Contract 8).

tenant_id.description: Isolation-boundary UUID for the request (Contract 13). Emitted on every tenant-scoped log line.

agent_id.description: Agent identifier (UUID) associated with the request, if any.

duration_ms.description: Operation duration in milliseconds, when the log line marks the end of a timed operation.

extra.description: Free-form structured context. Service-specific key/value pairs that do not belong to a standard field.
